items.title: Explaining NBA "Mutual Options":
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Explaining NBA "Mutual Options":

Not an actual CBA term, but a good descriptor for what's becoming a popular trend in the NBA. What happens is that on the final year of a contract, the player has an option. But if they opt in, the deal is then partially/non-guaranteed. Thus = mutual option.

items.title: Nikola Vucevic is returning to the Orlando Magic, per Shams.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Nikola Vucevic is returning to the Orlando Magic, per Shams.

Vuc was a consummate pro in Boston. It just didn’t work out. Fracturing his ring finger had a lot to do with that.

Cool seeing him go back to Orlando, where his career took off and he became an All-Star.

items.title: July 1, 1984: The U.S. Olympic basketball team defeats a team of NBA players, 94-90, in an exhibition game at the Metrodome in Minneapolis.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 1, 1984: The U.S. Olympic basketball team defeats a team of NBA players, 94-90, in an exhibition game at the Metrodome in Minneapolis.

Sam Perkins (University of North Carolina) scored 16 PTS to lead the Olympians. Kevin McHale scored a team-high 18 PTS for the NBA squad.

items.title: Free agent Moe Wagner has agreed to a two-year, $19 million deal with the Brooklyn Nets, sources tell ESPN. The deal contains a mutual option guaranteeing the $19M while allowing either side to opt-in (not opt-out) along with having a conversation about doing a new contract next
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent Moe Wagner has agreed to a two-year, $19 million deal with the Brooklyn Nets, sources tell ESPN. The deal contains a mutual option guaranteeing the $19M while allowing either side to opt-in (not opt-out) along with having a conversation about doing a new contract next summer.

media.description: Veteran point guard Mike Conley is joining the Celtics on a one-year deal.

items.title: Orlando Magic salary cap situation after signing Nikola Vucevic.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Orlando Magic salary cap situation after signing Nikola Vucevic.

He'll earn $3.9 million but count as $2.4 million on their cap sheet.

This likely means Moe Wagner won't return.

They can fill their remaining roster spots with minimums and remain under the second apron.

items.title: Adding Conley doesn't change anything for any bigger plans for the Celtics. They can still use the full $15M Non-Taxpayer MLE or some (or all) of the $27.7M TPE.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Adding Conley doesn't change anything for any bigger plans for the Celtics. They can still use the full $15M Non-Taxpayer MLE or some (or all) of the $27.7M TPE.

I also wouldn't assume Conley being in the fold guarantees anyone else is getting traded. Good vet depth move.
